extension.summary: Create, view, edit and delete your advancedsettings.xml file in a user-friendly gui
extension.description: All settings follow the xbmc.org wiki[CR][CR]With this tool you can create your advanced settings directly from XBMC[CR][CR]If you don't know what a setting does, don't enable it!

extension.summary: Listen to music, watch videos and view photos from your Google Drive account
extension.description: Plays music and video from your Google Drive account. Not affiliated with Google.

extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the content provider.

extension.summary: [COLOR aquamarine][B]ONE[/COLOR][COLOR white]PLAY[/B][/COLOR] - [B]It is a free video plugin for KODI that aggregates video playback links of various types. Bringing pleasure and pleasure for you to watch and enjoy every moment with family and friends.

[COLOR aquamarine][B]ONE[/COLOR][COLOR white]PLAY[/B][/COLOR] - [B]Ã‰ um plugin de vÃ­deo gratuito para o KODI que agrega links de reproduÃ§Ã£o de vÃ­deos de vÃ¡rios tipos. Levando o lazer e o prazer para vocÃªs assistir e curtir cada momento com a famÃ­lia e amigos.
extension.description: [COLOR aquamarine][B]ONE[/COLOR][COLOR white]PLAY[/B][/COLOR] - Install or upgrade the add-on without downloading the zip.
[COLOR aquamarine][B]ONE[/COLOR][COLOR white]PLAY[/B][/COLOR] - Instale ou atualize o add-on sem a necessidade de baixar o zip.
extension.disclaimer: The author is in no way affiliated with the Kodi, Team Kodi or the XBMC Foundation. This is a non-profit resource organized solely for educational purposes and protected by the fair use doctrine of the Copyright Act, specifically section 107, which promotes freedom of expression by allowing unlicensed use of copyrighted works.

O autor nao e de forma alguma afiliado ao Kodi, Team Kodi ou a XBMC Foundation. Este e um recurso sem fins lucrativos, organizado exclusivamente para fins educacionais e protegido pela doutrina de uso justo da Lei de Direitos Autorais, especificamente a secao 107, que promove a liberdade de expressao, permitindo o uso nao licenciado de obras protegidas por direitos autorais.

extension.news: [add] 'Play (Ask for quality)' context menu [add] search by channel or playlist id [add] hide_folders, hide_playlists, hide_search, and hide_live to /channel/<channel_id>/ end-point - ie. plugin://plugin.video.youtube/channel/UC4PooiX37Pld1T8J5SYT-SQ/?hide_folders=true will hide all folders(Playlists, Search, and Live) in the channel listing [fix] playback for some videos (ie. music videos) [fix] playback of some videos with no adaptive video streams [fix] don't update watch history when incognito/screensaver/live |contrib: regseb| [fix] search prompting for input after video playback or refresh [lang] el_gr strings |contrib: twilight0| [lang] es_es strings |contrib: roliverosc| [lang] pt_br strings |contrib: MediaBrasil| [lang] cs_cz strings |contrib: llzn.cz| [lang] it_it strings |contrib: SebastianoPistore| [lang] de_de strings |contrib: tweimer|
extension.description: O YouTube Ã© um dos maiores sites de compartilhamento de vÃ­deo do mundo.
extension.disclaimer: Este plugin nÃ£o Ã© recomendado pelo Google
extension.description: YouTube is one of the largest video sharing sites in the world.
extension.disclaimer: This plugin is not recommended by Google

extension.description: Use this addon to play F4m v1 and v2 streams
